code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let maybe_line = io.read_line()
  let line = match maybe_line
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = words.len()

  mut result = ""
  mut i = n - 1
  while i >= 0
    let word = match words.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      ""
    end
    if string.is_empty(result)
      result = word
    else
      result = "#{result} #{word}"
    end
    i = i - 1
  end

  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
